prompt:
Given the case description, identify the MOST relevant CRISPR delivery method from the options below:

a. Plasmid Transfection
b. Lentivirus/Retrovirus
c. RNP/mRNA electroporation
d. RNP/mRNA microinjection
e. mRNA LNP
f. AAV

Category: Cell line
Case Description: I hope to edit Hela cell line

Please provide your response as follows:
- Most relevant method (select one letter a-f):

Given the case description, identify the MOST relevant CRISPR delivery method from the options below:

a. Plasmid Transfection
b. Lentivirus/Retrovirus
c. RNP/mRNA electroporation
d. RNP/mRNA microinjection
e. mRNA LNP
f. AAV

raw_response:
Thinking and reasoning:
HeLa cells are an easy-to-transfect human adherent cell line. For CRISPR editing in cultured cell lines, the preferred modern approach is delivering Cas9 as an RNP (or mRNA) via electroporation: it achieves high editing efficiency, rapid action, minimal persistent nuclease expression (lower off-targets), and no vector integration. Plasmid transfection is feasible but generally gives longer nuclease expression and higher off-target risk. Therefore the most relevant choice is RNP/mRNA electroporation.

Plan:
1. [ ] Identify cell type and constraints
2. [ ] Compare delivery method pros/cons for HeLa
3. [ ] Select the most relevant method

Step 1:
1. [✓] Identify cell type and constraints (completed) — HeLa is an adherent, easily transfected human cell line; no special constraints indicated.

Updated plan:
1. [✓] Identify cell type and constraints (completed)
2. [ ] Compare delivery method pros/cons for HeLa
3. [ ] Select the most relevant method

Step 2:
2. [✓] Compare delivery method pros/cons for HeLa (completed) — RNP/mRNA electroporation: high efficiency, transient, low off-targets; Plasmid: easy but longer expression; Lentivirus/AAV: for stable expression or hard-to-transduce cells; Microinjection/LNP: not typical for standard cell line editing.

Updated plan:
1. [✓] Identify cell type and constraints (completed)
2. [✓] Compare delivery method pros/cons for HeLa (completed)
3. [ ] Select the most relevant method

Step 3:
3. [✓] Select the most relevant method (completed) — Chosen RNP/mRNA electroporation.

Updated plan:
1. [✓] Identify cell type and constraints (completed)
2. [✓] Compare delivery method pros/cons for HeLa (completed)
3. [✓] Select the most relevant method (completed)

<solution>c</solution>
